public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as recruiter.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Shirsh, that reads as someone investigative, magically literate, and discreet, balancing inquiry with regulation, and the habits of a recruiter still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of recruiter in and around House Shirsh, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Shirsh workable through the obligations of recruiter while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shirsh.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around House Shirsh, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of recruiter visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Thessa Mistglass can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Thessa Mistglass can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Thessa Mistglass carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Shirsh: the part of House Shirsh where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
